programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Estranhos Companheiros - T02E107
programme.desc: 2009. Para proteger yuukimaru, naruto e guren lutam lado a lado contra a besta de três caudas e são tragados. Dentro da besta há um mundo antinatural cheio de calcário Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Caminho Das Camélias - T02E108
programme.desc: 2009. Os ninja da folha descobrem que naruto está dentro da besta de três caudas. Sem outra alternativa senão confiar nos sentidos místicos de yuukimaru, kakashi e os outros seguem a orientação do menino e tentam uma missão de salvamento Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Contra Ataque Da Marca Da Maldição - T02E109
programme.sub-title: O Contra Ataque Da Marca Da Maldição
programme.desc: 2009. Apesar da tentativa de salvamento, naruto e guren não retornam. A frustração aumenta entre o grupo, mas quando a besta de três caudas desperta de seu sono, a equipe de selamento faz uma segunda tentativa com a barreira de selamento de quatro pontas. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Consciência Culpada - T02E110
programme.desc: 2009. Kabuto planeja fazer a três caudas matar os ninja da folha sacrificando o poder e a vida de yuukimaru. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: A Promessa Quebrada - T02E111
programme.desc: 2009. Kabuto finalmente aparece na frente de naruto. Sabendo que orochimaru usou guren e yuukimaru para seus próprios propósitos, um naruto enfurecido entra em batalha contra kabuto. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Um Lugar Para Retornar‏ - T02E112
programme.desc: 2009. Os ninjas da folha estão tratando seus ferimentos. A batalha deixou todos com sérios ferimentos. Shizune examina yuukimaru, que está em coma, mas seu corpo não é mais capaz de controlar a três caudas. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Voltando Para Casa - T01E01
programme.desc: 2007. Na aldeia da folha, a equipe de konohamaru foi promovida a genin e agora vai a missões nível d sob a supervisão de ebisu. As constante reclamações de konohamaru lembra iruka e os outros de naruto.até que uma figura passa pelos portões. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Os Akatsuki Entram Em Ação - T01E02
programme.desc: 2007. Jiraiya completou seu novo romance, amassos no paraíso, para felicidade de kakashi. Mas jiraiya também trouxe notícias altamente secretas de que os akatsuki entraram em ação. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: Os Resultados Do Treinamento - T01E03
programme.desc: 2007. As habilidades combinadas de naruto e sakura forçam kakashi usar seu sharingan imediatamente. Naruto habilmente lança um jutsu após outro. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: Naruto Shippuden: O Jinchuriki Da Areia - T01E04
programme.desc: 2007. Gaara rapidamente descobrir a presença da deidara, e uma batalha aérea com deidara em seu pássaro gigante e gaara acontece na areia. O jonin da areia é yura que, na verdade, é um agente da akatsuki, e a aldeia da areia sofre grandes danos. Gêneros: Anime Elenco: Ursula Bezerra, Tati Keplmair, Robson Kumode, Marcus Pejon, Yuri Chesman, Vagner Fagundes, Flavia Narciso, Thiago Keplmair, Elcio Sodre Diretor: Hayato Date

programme.title: 2009. O primeiro-ministro foi sequestrado por alienígenas, e Endou e os outros estão determinados a ajudá-lo. A Caravana Inazuma viaja para o parque onde foi sequestrado, pronto para derrotar os alienígenas. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E29

programme.title: 2009. O Raimon Eleven nunca desiste, e eles vão tentar novamente contra a Aliea Academy. Eles vão cara a cara, mas a Academia Aliea é muito poderosa. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E30

programme.title: 2009. Raimon finalmente chega a Hakuren, mas o que os choca é que ... eles veem a mesma pessoa que viram da última vez, e foi revelado que era Fubuki Shirou. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama

programme.title: 2009. O Raimon subiu de nível durante o treinamento de snowboard e está pronto para enfrentar a Aliea Academy mais uma vez. Mas eles têm o que é preciso para vencê-los? E mesmo se o fizerem, o que mais a Aliea Academy tem reservado. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama

programme.title: 2009. Quando todos pensavam que a Terra havia sido salva, a Academia Aliea atacou mais uma vez, desta vez com Epsilon. Essas caras realmente querem dizer negócios e vão bater em Manyuuji em Kyōto. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama

programme.title: 2009. Após a derrota esmagadora do Manyuuji Junior High, Raimon se prepara para enfrentá-los, com Kogure Yuuya ajudando no pedido de Otonashi Haruna. Os resultados são estranhos e desanimadores, mas também encorajadores. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E36

programme.title: 2009. Raimon tem um novo membro, Kogure, que faz brincadeiras com eles o tempo todo. Ainda assim, eles precisarão de toda a ajuda possível. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama
programme.desc: Super Onze - T01E37

programme.title: 2009. Raimon está preso no meio de um jogo contra a True Teikoku Academy, e Kageyama convenceu seus jogadores a usarem todos os meios para vencer; mesmo que isso signifique a destruição de suas mentes e corpos. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama

programme.title: 2009. Raimon finalmente chega em casa para recarregar as baterias e treinar muito mais. Eles descobrem que todo mundo está treinando para ajudá-los, incluindo alguns antigos oponentes. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama

programme.title: 2009. Assim que chegam em casa, e Raimon estão de volta à estrada novamente - desta vez eles estão indo para akasaka, onde há rumores de que a Aliea Academy tem uma base. Gêneros: Anime Diretor: Katsuhito Akiyama

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - White Men Can Funk
programme.desc: A replacement singer (guest star Adrian Zmed) shocks Steves (Steve Harvey) band, the Hi-Tops, with his talented vocals.

programme.title: The Steve Harvey Show - Ring Around the Piggy
programme.desc: Steve fears he will lose Regina forever when he is invited to Warringtons house for an announcement.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - Fighting Kyles
programme.desc: Michael and Jay give their bickering kids a taste of their own medicine, making them scared theyre on the brink of breaking up.

programme.title: My Wife and Kids - Sister Story
programme.desc: Michaels sister (Vivica A. Fox) visits and sparks a rivalry with Jay.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - The Big Picture
programme.desc: Jordans prank anonymous phone calls have surprising consequences.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - The Music Mac
programme.desc: When Vanessa surprises everyone with her musical talent, Isaac Hayes offers Bernie advice on how to nurture it.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Walk Like a Man
programme.desc: Bernie sees children walking to school on their own and decides it is time for Jordan to do the same, despite Wandas objections.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Father Knows Best
programme.desc: When a man arrives from Chicago claiming to be Bryanas father, Bernie is cautiously supportive.

programme.title: Risk-Free Hearing Aid!
programme.desc: Call today to try the high quality, low-price Audien hearing aid, risk-free! No doctor or fittings necessary.

programme.title: Best Mattress Topper Ever!
programme.desc: Back Pain? Hip? Sleep well thanks to this cooling topper!

programme.title: The Aging Brain
programme.desc: Learn whats behind mental decline with age, and how to improve memory, focus and concentration with NeuroQs Darrin Peterson and Dale Bredesen MD.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote And installation.

programme.title: NEW! Shark PowerDetect with DuoClean Detect Technology
programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing, and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: Cindy Crawford talks about the latest breakthroughs in skincare
programme.desc: Join Cindy Crawford as she talks to real customers about the breakthrough skincare system that keeps them looking their best. Take a trip to the stunning French countryside to see the rare French melon that defies the aging process.

programme.title: Rateescape: Stop Overpaying for Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote And installation.

programme.title: Urban Indie Film Block - The Power of Resilience
programme.desc: Learning how the way one rises from challenges is what defines them.

programme.title: Hustle, Sizzle, and Smoke - Oxtail and Sweet Potato
programme.desc: Jimmie Jackson of Jimmie Jerk Chicken faces off against Adaya Nijay of Atlanta Vegan Breakfast; the challenge is to turn oxtails and sweet potatoes into a delicious pairing.

programme.title: Hustle, Sizzle, and Smoke - Wings and Cabbage
programme.desc: Hanashi Weathers, AKA Da Rib Lady, competes against Lawrence McIntosh of Mo Betta Barbecue; they must tackle making delectable dishes featuring southern staples: wings and cabbage.

programme.title: Hustle, Sizzle, and Smoke - Burger and Potato
programme.desc: Jay Craddick from Twisted Dish grills it up against Amanda Kinsey-Joplin of Amandas BarBeeQue; the menu includes backyard barbecue staples like burgers and potatoes.

programme.title: Hustle, Sizzle, and Smoke - Brisket and Beans
programme.desc: Steve Morales of Smokey Steves BBQ competes with Markie Darling of Daddys Girl BBQ; the pitmasters are challenged with creating smoky and savory dishes featuring brisket and beans.

programme.title: Really Love
programme.desc: A rising Black painter tries to break into the competitive art world while balancing an unexpected romance with an ambitious law student.

programme.title: The Forgettable Life of Liam White
programme.desc: An uninspired novelist begins a journey of self-reflection and reconciliation when he learns that his cancer has returned.

programme.title: Family Time - Let Cheatin Dogs Lie
programme.desc: Tony and Lisa are shocked that Devin has a new girlfriend but are even more surprised to discover that Tony has a history with her mother.

programme.title: Family Time - Halloween Time
programme.desc: Lisa puts a halt on Halloween while she solves the mystery of her broken clock.

programme.title: Family Time - Theyre Shooting
programme.desc: Lisa meets her celebrity crush; Tony deals with a strike at the office.

programme.title: Family Time - Stalking for Love
programme.desc: Lisas aunt comes for a visit; Donnie gets stalked.

programme.title: Family Time - No Thanksgiving
programme.desc: The Stallworths deal with everyone canceling on Thanksgiving.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Five Stages of Bryana
programme.desc: Bernie and Wanda seek a child therapists help in figuring out why Bryana has become a bully; Wanda winds up caring for a guinea pig Bernie bought for Bryana.

programme.title: The Bernie Mac Show - Go Bernie, Its Your Birthday
programme.desc: On Bernies 40th birthday, he is electrically shocked by an old lady and forced to be a clown at a childrens party.

programme.title: Heavens Gate (1980)
programme.desc: A well-educated marshal defends immigrant settlers against cattle barons in the 1890s Johnson County, Wyoming.

programme.title: John Carpenters Escape From L.A. (1996)
programme.desc: The fascist U.S. president enlists a jailed war hero (Kurt Russell) to retrieve a top-secret device stolen by his daughter on island Los Angeles in 2013.

programme.title: Blown Away (1994)
programme.desc: An Irish explosive expert targets an old foe and his family living in Boston.

programme.title: American Classic
programme.desc: Richard and Kristen panic after the Circle of Truth revelation; Miranda is missing, and Alby warns that theater critic Xander Young is attending opening night; Linus drops a bomb at the party that changes the Bean family forever.

programme.title: Mercy (2026)
programme.desc: In the near future, an advanced AI judge tells a captive detective that hes on trial for the murder of his wife. If he fails to prove his innocence within 90 minutes, hell be executed on the spot.

programme.title: Terminator Genisys (2015)
programme.desc: Kyle Reese goes back to 1984 to save Sarah Connor and emerges in an alternate timeline in which Sarah has been raised as a warrior by a Terminator guardian.

programme.title: Explorers (1985)
programme.desc: Three boys (Ethan Hawke, River Phoenix, Jason Presson) take a homemade spaceship to another galaxy and meet aliens who speak American TV.

programme.title: American Classic
programme.desc: Richard and Kristen panic after the Circle of Truth revelation; Miranda is missing, and Alby warns that theater critic Xander Young is attending opening night; Linus drops a bomb at the party that changes the Bean family forever.

programme.title: Weekend in Taipei (2024)
programme.desc: A former DEA agent and an ex-undercover operative rekindle their romance during a weekend in Taipei. As they reconnect, theyre oblivious to the looming dangers stemming from their past operations.

programme.title: Three Amigos! (1986)
programme.desc: Three silent-film cowboys (Chevy Chase, Steve Martin, Martin Short) come to Mexico to perform but instead are expected to save a town.

programme.title: The Package (1989)
programme.desc: An Army sergeant (Gene Hackman) and his officer ex-wife (Joanna Cassidy) are caught in a Cold War plot over a military prisoner (Tommy Lee Jones).

programme.title: Shine a Light (2008)
programme.desc: Filmmaker Martin Scorsese documents a 2006 Rolling Stones concert at New Yorks Beacon Theatre, featuring guest appearances by Buddy Guy, Christina Aguilera and Jack White III.

programme.title: The Wasp (2024)
programme.desc: Two estranged friends unveil a dangerous and deceptive plot that forever changes their lives.

programme.title: The Portable Door (2023)
programme.desc: A man lands an internship at a mysterious London firm with unconventional employees, including the charismatic CEO who is incorporating modern corporate strategy into ancient magical practices.

programme.title: Ghost Town (2008)
programme.desc: A man (Ricky Gervais) who sees spirits finally agrees to a persistent request by one of them to sabotage the impending marriage of his widow (Tea Leoni).

programme.title: Cadillac Man (1990)
programme.desc: An angry husband (Tim Robbins) catches up to a wise-guy car salesman (Robin Williams) who cons customers and women.

programme.title: Bull Durham (1988)
programme.desc: A literary baseball groupie (Susan Sarandon) romances a pitcher (Tim Robbins) and a catcher (Kevin Costner) on a minor-league North Carolina team.

programme.title: Major League (1989)
programme.desc: Lackluster baseball players (Tom Berenger, Charlie Sheen, Corbin Bernsen) hear their Cleveland teams new owner is counting on them to lose.

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day (1991)
programme.desc: Two cyborgs from the future battle over the life of a teen (Edward Furlong) who will someday lead humanity against the machines.

programme.title: Vicious (2025)
programme.desc: A strange ritual soon unravels into a waking nightmare when a woman receives a mysterious box that comes with instructions to place three things inside: something you need, something you hate, and something you love.

programme.title: Paranormal Activity: The Marked Ones (2014)
programme.desc: Family and friends try to save a Hispanic teen who appears to be possessed by malevolent supernatural forces.

programme.title: Paranormal Activity: The Ghost Dimension (2015)
programme.desc: An old and mysterious camcorder leads to the discovery of a supernatural terror in a familys new home.

programme.title: Rush (2013)
programme.desc: Charismatic Englishman James Hunt (Chris Hemsworth) and Austrian perfectionist Niki Lauda (Daniel Bruhl) burn up the 1970s Formula 1 racing scene and share an intense rivalry on the track.

programme.title: Shaft (2000)
programme.desc: A detective (Samuel L. Jackson) and a narcotics cop (Vanessa L. Williams) track a sociopath out to kill a woman who can testify that he committed murder.

programme.title: 3 Days to Kill (2014)
programme.desc: A dying Secret Service agent (Kevin Costner) who wants to reconnect with his estranged daughter (Hailee Steinfeld) is offered a potentially lifesaving drug in exchange for completing one final mission.

programme.title: Welcome to Sarajevo (1997)
programme.desc: A British war reporter (Stephen Dillane) becomes obsessed with an orphanage near the front lines in 1992.

programme.title: Paranormal Activity (2007)
programme.desc: A young couple (Katie Featherston, Micah Sloat) move into their first new home but are disturbed by what appears to be a supernatural presence that is most active at night.

programme.title: Not Without Hope (2025)
programme.desc: Four friends face disaster when their boat capsizes in the Gulf of Mexico. Battling massive waves, sharks, dehydration and hypothermia, they cling to hope as the Coast Guard launches a daring rescue through a raging storm to save them.

programme.title: The Survivalist (2021)
programme.desc: A year and a half after the fall of civilization due to a viral outbreak, a former FBI agent is forced to protect a young woman immune to the disease from a dangerous gang leader hunting her.

programme.title: Reindeer Games (2000)
programme.desc: An ex-convict (Ben Affleck) wants to start a new life with his girlfriend (Charlize Theron), but her brother (Gary Sinise) involves him in a scheme to rob a casino.

programme.title: Deep Impact (1998)
programme.desc: As a comet is on a collision course with earth, humans have to prepare for their survival. They randomly select eight hundred thousand people to be saved in order to keep the human race alive.

programme.title: 2 Days in the Valley (1996)
programme.desc: A hit man (Danny Aiello) falls for an art dealers helper (Glenne Headly) amid confusion in the San Fernando Valley.

programme.title: Old Guy (2024)
programme.desc: An aging hit man must train a young prodigy when his employer moves to replace the old guard. However, when they learn theyre being betrayed, the unlikely pair turns into a lethal team -- with their double-crossing bosses in their sights.

programme.title: Shutter Island (2010)
programme.desc: A 1950s lawman (Leonardo DiCaprio) pursues a murderess who appears to have vanished from a locked room within a fortresslike psychiatric hospital.

programme.title: Reindeer Games (2000)
programme.desc: An ex-convict (Ben Affleck) wants to start a new life with his girlfriend (Charlize Theron), but her brother (Gary Sinise) involves him in a scheme to rob a casino.

programme.title: Not Without Hope (2025)
programme.desc: Four friends face disaster when their boat capsizes in the Gulf of Mexico. Battling massive waves, sharks, dehydration and hypothermia, they cling to hope as the Coast Guard launches a daring rescue through a raging storm to save them.

programme.title: Due Justice (2023)
programme.desc: Consumed by grief and driven by revenge, a former Marine embarks on a relentless mission to hunt down those responsible for the brutal murders of his beloved wife and daughter.

programme.title: Supercop (1992)
programme.desc: A Hong Kong policeman (Jackie Chan) and a mainland policewoman (Michelle Yeaoh) meet, team up and join a drug ring to destroy it.

programme.title: The Time Machine (2002)
programme.desc: A scientist (Guy Pearce) travels into the future and meets a race of people who fear hideous monsters living under the ground.

programme.title: Star Trek: Section 31 (2025)
programme.desc: Emperor Philippa Georgiou faces the sins of her past after joining a secret division of Starfleet thats tasked with protecting the United Federation of Planets.

programme.title: The Silent Planet (2024)
programme.desc: Serving a life sentence alone on a distant planet, an aging convict must confront his past when a new prisoner arrives and forces him to remember his life on Earth.

programme.title: Heist 88 (2023)
programme.desc: A criminal mastermind decides to pull one last job before going to prison and recruits a group of young bank employees to steal millions in a daring and brazen assault on the U.S. banking system.

programme.title: Cursed (2005)
programme.desc: Siblings (Christina Ricci, Jesse Eisenberg) hunt for the werewolf that attacked them and transformed them into lycanthropes.

programme.title: Paranormal Activity 4 (2012)
programme.desc: A teenager (Kathryn Newton) bears witness to terrifying events that occur when she and her family become the temporary caretakers of a creepy neighbor boy.

programme.title: Cujo (1983)
programme.desc: Bitten by a rabid bat, a huge dog traps a Maine woman (Dee Wallace) and her young son (Danny Pintauro) in their Ford Pinto.

programme.title: Case 39 (2009)
programme.desc: A social worker (Renee Zellweger) saves a girl (Jodelle Ferland) from abusive parents but finds there is more to the child than meets the eye.

programme.title: The Warrior (2001)
programme.desc: A swordsman (Irfan Khan) must outrun a despots henchmen after he renounces violence and heads for the Himalayas.

programme.title: Scream 4 (2011)
programme.desc: The Ghostface Killer returns with a vengeance when self-help author Sidney Prescott arrives in Woodsboro on the last stop of her book tour.

programme.title: American Assassin (2017)
programme.desc: Cold War veteran Stan Hurley takes CIA black ops recruit Mitch Rapp under his wing, and they join forces with a lethal Turkish agent to stop a mysterious operative who wants to start a global war.

programme.title: 68 Kill (2017)
programme.desc: A hardworking mans inability to say no to a beautiful women gets him in trouble when he agrees to steal $68,000.

programme.title: Congo (1995)
programme.desc: Killer gorillas menace an ex-CIA agent (Laura Linney), a primatologist (Dylan Walsh) and others on a mission in Africa.

programme.title: Maniac (2012)
programme.desc: A serial killer (Elijah Wood) removes his victims scalps and attaches them to the vintage mannequins he restores in his late mothers shop.

programme.title: Case 39 (2009)
programme.desc: A social worker (Renee Zellweger) saves a girl (Jodelle Ferland) from abusive parents but finds there is more to the child than meets the eye.

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in the West (1968)
programme.sub-title: Once Upon a Time in the West (1968)
programme.desc: An outlaw (Henry Fonda) working for a railroad magnate fights a stranger (Charles Bronson) for a New Orleans widows (Claudia Cardinale) land.

programme.title: Cypher (2002)
programme.desc: A man (Jeremy Northam) soon becomes confused about his own identity after he becomes a corporate spy for each of two rival firms.

programme.title: Paranormal Activity 3 (2011)
programme.desc: A videographer becomes obsessed with finding the source of disturbing late-night noises in his home and discovers its terrifying origin.

programme.title: Sleeping Dogs (2024)
programme.desc: Suffering from memory loss, a former homicide detective tries to solve a brutal murder that he cant recall. As he pieces together evidence from a decade-old investigation, he soon uncovers a sinister web of buried secrets tied to his forgotten past.

programme.title: Captive (2015)
programme.desc: Recovering drug addict Ashley Smith (Kate Mara) reads Rick Warrens "The Purpose Driven Life" as armed fugitive Brian Nichols (David Oyelowo) holds her hostage in her apartment.

programme.title: Mindhunters (2004)
programme.desc: A serial killer targets a group of FBI trainees (Jonny Lee Miller, Kathryn Morris) and a Philadelphia policeman (LL Cool J) on a deserted island.

programme.title: Breach (2020)
programme.desc: Fleeing a devastating plague on Earth, an interstellar ark comes under attack from a new threat -- a shape-shifting alien force intent on slaughtering whats left of humanity.

programme.title: The Aviator (2004)
programme.desc: During the 1930s and 40s, wealthy industrialist Howard Hughes (Leonardo DiCaprio) gains fame as a movie producer, airplane designer and pilot.

programme.title: The English Patient (1996)
programme.desc: A Hungarian counts (Ralph Fiennes) fling with a British newlywed leads to tragedy in World War II North Africa.

programme.title: True Grit (2010)
programme.desc: A teenage girl (Hailee Steinfeld) enlists the aid of a boozy, trigger-happy lawman (Jeff Bridges) to hunt down her fathers killer (Josh Brolin).

programme.title: Personal Shopper (2016)
programme.desc: A young American in Paris works as a personal shopper for a celebrity. She seems to have the ability to communicate with spirits, like her recently deceased twin brother. Soon, she starts to receive ambiguous messages from an unknown source.

programme.title: Case 39 (2009)
programme.desc: A social worker (Renee Zellweger) saves a girl (Jodelle Ferland) from abusive parents but finds there is more to the child than meets the eye.

programme.title: The Virgin Suicides (1999)
programme.desc: Men reminisce about intriguing sisters, whose parents (James Woods, Kathleen Turner) quarantined them after one of the five killed herself.

programme.title: Mommie Dearest (1981)
programme.desc: Movie queen Joan Crawford (Faye Dunaway) pampers and punishes her adopted son and daughter (Diana Scarwid).

programme.title: Yes, Madam (1985)
programme.desc: A relentless inspector (Michelle Yeoh) and a Scotland Yard detective (Cynthia Rothrock) investigate murder linked to microfilm.

programme.title: Scream (1996)
programme.desc: A psycho killer targets a past victims daughter (Neve Campbell), while a tabloid TV reporter (Courteney Cox) homes in on his identity.

programme.title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: The Cradle of Life (2003)
programme.sub-title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: The Cradle of Life (2003)
programme.desc: A globe-trotter (Angelina Jolie) must find Pandoras box before a maniacal scientist (Ciarán Hinds) can harness its power for world domination.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason (2004)
programme.sub-title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason (2004)
programme.desc: An attractive lawyer and Bridgets (Renee Zellweger) former boss (Hugh Grant) threaten her newfound happiness with Mark Darcy (Colin Firth).

programme.title: Florence Foster Jenkins (2016)
programme.desc: In 1940s New York, a man (Hugh Grant) goes to extreme lengths to make sure his wife (Meryl Streep) never finds out that shes an awful opera singer.

programme.title: Terms of Endearment (1983)
programme.desc: A strong-willed woman (Shirley MacLaine) and her equally independent daughter (Debra Winger) keep the lines of communication open as each deals with the curveballs life throws at them.

programme.title: The Evening Star (1996)
programme.desc: A spunky woman (Shirley MacLaine) copes with her troubled adult grandchildren, feuds with an enemy and has a fling with a younger man (Bill Paxton).

programme.title: A Bad Moms Christmas (2017)
programme.desc: As if creating the perfect Christmas for their families isnt hard enough, under-appreciated and overburdened moms Amy, Kiki and Carla will have to do it while hosting and entertaining their own respective mothers during the holidays.

programme.title: Babel (2006)
programme.desc: A tragic accidents scope expands, catching four groups of people on three continents in its terrible grip.

programme.title: Mommie Dearest (1981)
programme.desc: Movie queen Joan Crawford (Faye Dunaway) pampers and punishes her adopted son and daughter (Diana Scarwid).

programme.title: The Peacemaker (1997)
programme.desc: A scientist (Nicole Kidman) and an Army Special Forces colonel (George Clooney) travel the globe in pursuit of stolen nuclear weapons.

programme.title: Hes Just Not That Into You (2009)
programme.sub-title: Hes Just Not That Into You (2009)
programme.desc: Friends and lovers try to navigate their way through the complexities of modern relationships, sometimes misconstruing the true intentions of the opposite sex.

programme.title: Million Dollar Baby (2004)
programme.desc: A deep bond develops between a cantankerous trainer (Clint Eastwood) and the female boxer (Hilary Swank) he reluctantly takes under his wing.

programme.title: Cold Mountain (2003)
programme.desc: During the Civil War, a wounded Confederate soldier (Jude Law) abandons his duties to make his way home to his sweetheart (Nicole Kidman).

programme.title: Chocolat (2000)
programme.desc: The mayor opposes a single mother (Juliette Binoche) who is opening a chocolate shop in his 1950s French village across from a church during Lent.

programme.title: Muriels Wedding (1994)
programme.desc: An Australian social outcast (Toni Collette) moves to Sydney, cares for an ailing friend (Rachel Griffiths) and weds an Olympian needing citizen status.

programme.desc: A medical-school dropout tries to hide his attraction to his new friend, a bubbly artist who already has a boyfriend.

programme.title: The To Do List (2013)
programme.desc: Determined to shed her uptight image, a high-school valedictorian (Aubrey Plaza) decides to lose her virginity before college begins. Realizing that she is out of her depth, she asks friends and family for advice.

programme.title: Blue Eyed Girl (2025)

programme.title: Shakespeare in Love (1998)
programme.desc: Young William Shakespeare (Joseph Fiennes) falls for Viola (Gwyneth Paltrow), reawakening his creativity, but she is betrothed to Wessex.

programme.title: Election (1999)
programme.desc: Tracy faces no competition in her high school election, but the civics teacher intervenes by encouraging the varsity football player to run for president, resulting in chaos.

programme.desc: As Mothers Day draws near, a single mom (Jennifer Aniston) learns that her ex-husband (Timothy Olyphant) is marrying a younger woman (Shay Mitchell), while a recently widowed man (Jason Sudeikis) struggles to raise his two daughters.
